---
name: 📝 Concept Learning Task
about: Track the parallel study, documentation, and practice of a programming concept.
title: 'Concept: [Concept Name]'
labels: concept, learning
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Target Concept
Describe the concept to be studied (e.g., closures, inheritance, error propagation).

## 🚀 Checklist

### 🐍 Python Focus (70%)
- [ ] Read syntax documentation
- [ ] Create notes in `languages/python/[concept_folder]/README.md`
- [ ] Write working code snippets in target folder
- [ ] Complete mini practice exercise

### 🦀 Rust Focus (20-25%)
- [ ] Read syntax & memory ownership implications
- [ ] Create notes in `languages/rust/[concept_folder]/README.md`
- [ ] Write working code snippets in target folder
- [ ] Resolve compiler checks and complete mini practice exercise

### 📘 TypeScript Focus (5-10%)
- [ ] Read syntax & type annotation methods
- [ ] Create notes in `languages/typescript/[concept_folder]/README.md`
- [ ] Write working code snippets in target folder
- [ ] Complete basic frontend/API consumption exercise

### ⚖️ Parallel Comparison
- [ ] Document comparative differences in `parallel-concepts/[concept_folder]/README.md`
- [ ] Update [CONCEPT_INDEX.md](../../CONCEPT_INDEX.md) and [PROGRESS.md](../../PROGRESS.md)
